DefaultFontFamilyNames.value: 微软雅黑,宋体,PingFang SC,Noto Sans CJK SC

FontFile.desc: 字体名称：Roboto Mono，常规字体

Class.name: combo_base
Class.combo_edit_class: bkcolor='bg_richedit' text_align='vcenter' text_padding='2,0,2,0' single_line='true' word_wrap='false' auto_hscroll='true'

Class.name: combo
check_combo
combo_button
btn_wnd_settings_11
Class.normal_image: file='${PATH_BUTTON}/btn_setting.svg' width='18' height='18' valign='center' halign='center' margin='0,2,0,0'
